title: かけがえのない出会いに

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after <chrname> and I have
reached a milestone...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Good evening, Trainer
<username>. You've been
working so hard despite how late it's gotten.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... I was wondering, but... do you have any
plans for tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
If not, I was hoping we could spend some time
together and have a friendly discussion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, she takes me to a hill with a scenic
view of the entire city.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
The sky is so beautiful. The sun feels warm too.
It's lovely.
choice_data_list: Um, so why did you bring me here today?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I thought somewhere spacious, without walls,
would be the best place to open up one's heart.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes I wonder what I would be like had I
never met you...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: If you hadn't changed my stubborn ways.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
When I claimed my goal was to protect my
inexperienced racers' independence, I was merely
trying to make myself look good.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It was no better than neglect, the petty excuse of
an irresponsible adult.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I created an exact path for my trainees by
controlling every aspect of their lives.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I thought that so long as they never strayed from
the path I laid, they had nothing to fear.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That was the one and only way I had to protect
them...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I forced them in a direction I chose based on my
past experiences.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I demanded that they trust me, yet I never tried
to understand them.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I was a failure as an educator... and as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I mean it. You... and those precious racers were
the ones who made me realize my wrongs.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You remind me of how I was long
ago—passionate, honest, and trusting of my
racers.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That similarity was all the more reason why I
couldn't admit that you were skilled.
choice_data_list: Does that mean you acknowledge it now?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...Don't look so hopeful.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm joking. It's impossible not to
acknowledge your greatness now.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You brought back a lot of memories I needed
reminding of... and you taught me so much.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: You are the best rival I could ever ask for.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
I wonder where Trainer Kashimoto is. She
supposedly went this way, but I don't see her...

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Hey, don't hog the path!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna be the one who finds her first! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Excuse me? I'm going find her first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Stomp, stomp, stomp!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I think I hear Little Cocon and Bitter Glasse. What
are those two doing, yelling in public like that?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I suppose our grown-up chat has to end here.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer <username>.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: My adorable students are waiting for me.
